rulings.Case Title: WAUKEEN Q. MCCOY VS. CRAIG LIPTON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 18, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT CRAIG LIPTON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to June 3, 2016 pending the resolution of bankruptcy appeal. Defendant to file a supplemental brief/declaration re: status of appeal no later than May 31, 2016. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANA-MARIA GUERRERO VS. JAMES MCDERMOTT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 18, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANTS JAMES MCDERMOTT and NICHOLAS ANDRADE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED. Moving party has shifted its burden. Plaintiff failed to present evidence to create a triable issue of fact. SFRO 37.9(a)(10) requires that the "rental unit" (defined in SFRO 37.2) be removed from "housing use." Plaintiff's argument that "housing use" of the "space" constitutes a violation is not supported by the language of SFRO 37.9(a)(10) or any other authority. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAN JORDAN ET AL VS. MEHER PATEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Pursuant To Ccp To Substitute A Successor In Interest On Behalf Of Deceased Named Plaintiff David Johnson
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 18, 2016, line 5. PLAINTIFF DAN JORDAN, MADELEINE ASHDOWN Notice Of Motion And Motion Pursuant To Ccp To Substitute A Successor In Interest On Behalf Of Deceased Named Plaintiff David Johnson DENIED. Davida Johnson declares under penalty of perjury that "a true and correct copy of ¿ death certificate is attached hereto as Exhibit A." Per Plaintiff's counsel's admission this is not an accurate statement as the copy of the death certificate is not "true and correct" because it is redacted. Declaration of Melanie O'Brien Exhibit 1. = (501/REQ)
